name: Kitchen
summary: Meal-planning partner: recipe library, recurring routines, weekly menus, and what-we-actually-ate history.

schedules.name: scheduled-kitchen-weekly
schedules.taskPrompt: Draft next week's menu. Read the recipe library, routines, and recent history via your kitchen_* MCP tools. Recall family + dietary context via memory_search({ tags: ["family"] }). Save the resulting menu with kitchen_menu_save, then mail `friday` (subject: "Weekly menu draft") and `kitchen` (subject: "Weekly menu draft — yours to refine") with the rationale and a per-night summary.
